title: Lindsey Graham’s Death Leaves Fate of Russia Sanctions Bill Uncertain
summary_full: Supporters in both parties hope the measure to penalize Russia, championed by Senator Lindsey Graham, will gain momentum in his honor.
summary_public: Supporters in both parties hope the measure to penalize Russia, championed by Senator Lindsey Graham, will gain momentum in his honor.
